# PERF-065 positive: c.ShouldBind lives in a .Use()-registered middleware
lang: go
file: PERF-065-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

type Session struct {
	UserID string `form:"user_id"`
}

func MiddlewareBindSession(c *gin.Context) {
	var s Session
	if err := c.ShouldBind(&s); err != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	c.Set("user_id", s.UserID)
	c.Next()
	_ = http.StatusOK
}

func BuildRouterWithBind() *gin.Engine {
	r := gin.New()
	r.Use(MiddlewareBindSession)
	return r
}
